1.headline: Build. Defend. Survive the contamination.
1.subhead: The world is ruined. Rebuild what's yours and fight to keep it in this massive open-world survival game.
1.ctaMicro: Takes a minute to start. Install via Steam on Windows.

2.headline: Squad up—or go alone—against the mutated unknown.
2.subhead: A supernatural apocalypse has claimed the earth. Team up with friends or test your solo survival skills.
2.ctaMicro: Takes a minute to start. Install via Steam on Windows.

3.headline: Loot, craft, upgrade—push deeper into a ruined world.
3.subhead: Progression is everything. Gather resources, forge powerful gear, and conquer the contamination.
3.ctaMicro: Takes a minute to start. Install via Steam on Windows.

hero.trustMicro: Windows PC • Steam download • No signup

cards.title: Open-World Survival
cards.desc: Explore a massive, contiguous map filled with secrets and dangers.

cards.title: Loot & Craft
cards.desc: Scavenge resources to forge deadly weapons and advanced gear.

cards.title: Base-Building
cards.desc: Construct, upgrade, and defend your territory against supernatural threats.

cards.title: Mutated Creatures
cards.desc: Fight through nightmarish anomalies that defy physical reality.

cards.title: Solo or Squad
cards.desc: Brave the world alone or team up with friends to conquer the hardest zones.

cards.title: PvE-First
cards.desc: Focus on the story and environment, with optional PvP modes for hardcore players.

narrative.text: The contamination is spreading. The old world is dead. You are a Meta-Human. Evolve or die.

min.label: Minimum
min.gpu: Nvidia GTX 750 Ti / AMD Radeon R9 270

items.q: Is it available on Mac / console?
items.a: No, Once Human is currently available exclusively on Windows PC via Steam.
Yes, a Steam account is required to download and play the game.
Absolutely. You can play through the game solo or join a squad.
The game is PvE-focused, but PvP is optional depending on the mode and server you choose.
It features a dark, eerie sci-fi horror atmosphere full of mutated and supernatural threats.
The game's availability depends on your region. Downloads may also be blocked if you are using a VPN.
No, this is an informational page. The actual game download is handled officially through Steam.
Simply click the download link, install via Steam, launch the game, and create your role to begin.

footer.disclosure: Disclosure: This page may contain affiliate links. If you install the game through these links, we may earn a small commission.
footer.notWindows: Available on Windows PC via Steam.
